mental_emotional.text: Dull, cannot concentrate mind for study; forgets names; writes last letters of words first; misspells common words

head.text: Feels full, stuffed up, pain across forehead and above eyes. Great pressure at root of nose. Bewildered. Loss of consciousness. Pulsating headache

eyes.text: Painful, as of sand, smarting; difficult to focus for close work. Eyes feel sore, burn

nose.text: Stuffed; tightness at bridge of nose; acute nasal catarrh

face.text: Bloated in morning. Puffy under eyes

stomach_abdomen.text: Feels full and heavy. Eructations sour; offensive, an hour after luncheon and dinner. Vomiting at 2 pm
Intestinal flatulence. In morning rumbling in bowels, with desire for stool

stool_rectum.text: Constipation, stools hard, small lumps. Difficult, soft stools, with much straining. Much flatus. Bearing-down pain in rectum

urinary.text: Difficulty of retaining; dribbling when walking. Frequent urination at night

female.text: Bearing-down sensation. Vulva inflamed, with furious itching. Increased sexual desire, with ovarian and uterine pains and leucorrhœa

respiratory.text: Posterior nares raw; discharge thick, yellow mucus. Sneezing. Trachea sore; lumps feel constricted

back.text: Feels hot from sacrum to scapulæ. Backache, extending down legs. Pain over kidneys. Heat deep in spine

extremities.text: Muscular lameness, trembling. Pain in knees. Limbs feel stiff (Rhus)

skin.text: Erythema, with vesication and intense itching, stinging, and burning. Blisters, little lumps. Skin rough and cracked; feels like leather. Dermatitis, especially around knees. Inflammation resembling poison-oak. Inguinal glands and behind knee swollen

better_from.text: application of hot water, in morning, moving affected part

worse_from.text: application of cold water, in afternoon and evening

keynotes.text: color="#800000">XEROPHYLLUM Tamalpais Lily, Basket Grass Flower Should prove curative in eczematous conditions, poison-oak, early typhoid states, etc.
